evidence_coverage.interpretation: Evidence review count divided by gap plus task count.

strong_evidence_rate.interpretation: Strong evidence reviews as a share of all evidence reviews.

backwrite_rate.interpretation: Evidence reviews with planned evolution note writeback.

c3_gap_close_rate.interpretation: Closed or accepted C3 gaps divided by total C3 gaps.

blocked_age.interpretation: Current blocked item count; age computation requires issue timestamps from API.
